\tzpentry{ID3463}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3463 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \omega_n = \omega_0 (\pi n + 1/2). \]
